name: D & K Bus Charter Svc
recent_news: No recent news or web footprint found at the listed Fort Lauderdale address; the website listed in source data (Hersheyinsurance.Com) appears unrelated. A D&K Bus Charter LLC exists in Jefferson City, MO (USDOT 1892995, 6 power units, 18 drivers) but is a different entity by geography.
fit_notes: Very limited footprint; name suggests charter rather than contracted school routes. Without confirmed FL operating entity, not actionable as a tuck-in. Deprioritize pending better data.

name: Marilys School Bus
recent_news: Operating ~17+ years per directory listings; FL entity Marilys School Bus Service Inc registered ~2011 on Sunbiz with Marily Peraza as registered agent/officer. No M&A or notable news found.
fit_notes: Small family-owned Hialeah operator serving K-12 routes and field trips across Miami-Dade and SE Broward. Sub-scale (~28 EE, ~$1.2M est rev) but plausible bolt-on for a Miami platform building density.

name: Eastern School Bus Corp
districts_or_customers: NYC area (Queens) - likely NYC DOE / private school routes
recent_news: ~28 years in business per directory listings; small Flushing-based operator. No M&A or litigation news surfaced. Not clearly listed among the largest NYC OPT contractors.
fit_notes: Very small NYC operator (18 EE, ~$1.2M rev). Note source data website 'Eastern.K12.In.Us' is an Indiana school district and is incorrect. Tuck-in value would lie in any NYC OPT route allocation, but scale is marginal.

name: Steves School Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Possibly Camden County or Brantley County (GA) districts
recent_news: No web footprint found at the listed Waverly GA address; the listed source-data website (Stevemiller4lasvegas.Com) is unrelated. A Steve's School Bus Service Inc exists in Lyndeborough, NH but is a different entity.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm the GA entity is an active private school-bus contractor. Coastal-GA location (Camden/Brantley) would be a stretch geographically for Summit. Deprioritize pending verification.

name: Maria Gamboa Sch Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: FL entity formed ~2010 (per Sunbiz P10000096733); USDOT 2061199 active intrastate-only with 5 power units / 5 drivers. MCS-150 last updated 2010 — outdated filings. One tow-away crash on 24-month record. No M&A news.
fit_notes: Very small (5 buses) owner-operated Hialeah/Miami Gardens operator. Long-tenured female founder/operator suggests potential succession angle. Sub-scale on its own, but useful route density add-on for a Miami-Dade platform play.
